case_title: R. BRUCE GOODCHILD et al VS. TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,950.00 FILED BY GOODCHILD, R. BRUCE RUHFEL, ROBERT E. AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE - SUBSTITUED SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOODCHILD, R. BRUCE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-16-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-16-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-16-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOODCHILD, R. BRUCE RUHFEL, ROBERT E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES $1,650.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,735.00, THE DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT FOR ANY AMOUNTS ALREADY PAID TO THE PLAINTIFFS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
